lessonSubtitleText: Test how well you know this story

questions.text: What prayer did Jesus give us as an example?
What did Jesus tell us to call God when we pray?
How many requests (petitions) are in the Lord’s Prayer?
What does it mean to pray, 'Hallowed be Your name?'
answers: That God’s name would be honored
That God’s name would become hollow
That people would forget God’s name
That God would change His name

questions.text: What does it mean to pray, 'Your kingdom come?'
answers: That people believe the good news and join God’s kingdom
That we become kings and queens

questions.text: What does it mean to pray, 'Your will be done on earth as it is in heaven?'
answers: That people obey God like His angels do in heaven
That a man named Will would come to save us

questions.text: What does it mean to pray for our 'daily bread?'
answers: Asking God for what we need each day
Asking God to send miracle bread from heaven

questions.text: What does God do when we confess our sins?
What does it mean to be tempted?
answers: when something tests you to disobey God’s commands
When someething makes you want to obey God
When you want something someone else has
When you are hungry and angry
